assay: enzyme activities + H2O2 concentration & production rate determination
usable_for_human_wholecell: non-human proxy; treatment condition; relative only
notes: Catalase +506%, Se-GPx +331%, non-Se-GPx +188%, Mn-SOD +130%, CuZn-SOD unchanged (all % vs control). Absolute activities in tables = NOT_REPORTED.

endpoint: Gluconeogenesis fractional contributions to glucose output
usable_for_human_wholecell: mouse (non-human proxy); absolute glucose output NOT_REPORTED in abstract
notes: Glucose production from glycogen+PEP+glycerol; overall glucose output unchanged by L/P inversion; TCA flux 2-fold up. No/low GNG without lactate/pyruvate.
Apoptosis at baseline up to 2h; <1% of parenchyma throughout.
Oncotic necrosis is principal death mode; no caspase-3 at any time.

OIS occurs in hepatocytes in vivo; senescent cells immune-cleared (CD4 T-cell dependent). NO quantitative time-to-commitment reported - closest hepatocyte senescence primary source; commitment timing is a GAP.
